line_items.label: Land Purchase Price
line_items.notes: From INPUTS tab

line_items.label: Closing Costs
line_items.notes: Purchase Price × Closing %

line_items.label: Boundary & Topo Survey
line_items.notes: Flat cost — lot size / complexity dependent, not sqft of house

line_items.label: Wetland Delineation
line_items.notes: Skip if site is clearly upland. Flat cost — lot-size dependent.

line_items.label: Perc Test & Soil Evaluation
line_items.notes: Flat cost — site dependent

line_items.label: Well / Septic Feasibility Study
line_items.notes: Flat cost — site dependent

line_items.label: Environmental Review
line_items.notes: Only if prior industrial or agricultural use is suspected

line_items.label: Title, Easement & Legal Review
line_items.notes: Flat cost — transaction complexity dependent

line_items.label: Architect
line_items.notes: Calculated from INPUTS: architect_pct x construction mid estimate

line_items.label: Civil + Structural Engineering
line_items.notes: Calculated from INPUTS: engineering_pct x construction mid estimate

line_items.label: Septic Designer
line_items.notes: Flat cost — system complexity dependent

line_items.label: Permits & Fees
line_items.notes: Pulled from INPUTS: permits_fees_flat

line_items.label: Survey & Geotechnical
line_items.notes: Pulled from INPUTS: survey_geotech_flat

line_items.label: Legal & Miscellaneous
line_items.notes: Pulled from INPUTS: legal_misc_flat

line_items.label: Construction Loan Fees
line_items.notes: Calculated: ~1.5% of loan amount

line_items.label: Builder's Risk Insurance
line_items.notes: During construction period. Flat cost — project value dependent.

line_items.label: Land Clearing & Grading
line_items.notes: Lot-size dependent — not house sqft. Assumes ~3 usable acres with partial clearing.

line_items.label: Driveway
line_items.notes: Driveway length dependent — not house sqft. Assume long private drive to road.

line_items.label: Drainage & Stormwater Management
line_items.notes: Lot-size and topography dependent — not house sqft

line_items.label: Excavation
line_items.notes: Footprint-proportional. Scales with sqft_total via foundation footprint.

line_items.label: Erosion Control
line_items.notes: Lot-size dependent — not house sqft

line_items.label: Utility Trenching
line_items.notes: Distance to road / utilities dependent — not house sqft

line_items.label: Well (Drilled)
line_items.notes: If no municipal water available. Flat cost — depth / geology dependent.

line_items.label: Septic (Tank + Field)
line_items.notes: Bedroom count dependent, not house sqft directly. Size to full bedroom count.

line_items.label: Electric Service
line_items.notes: Distance to utility pole dependent — not house sqft

line_items.label: Propane / Gas
line_items.notes: Flat cost — tank size and distance dependent

line_items.label: Internet / Fiber
line_items.notes: Verify availability before land purchase. Distance dependent.

line_items.label: Conditioned Crawlspace
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $17-25-38/sqft | Preferred for Minka layout — allows sub-floor HVAC and plumbing access. Fill BUDGET:rate_foundation_crawl to adjust.

line_items.label: Slab on Grade
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $13-20-31/sqft | Lower cost; limits sub-floor mechanical access. Fill BUDGET:rate_foundation_slab to adjust.

line_items.label: Framing (Minka-Style Complex Roof)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $31-63-94/sqft | Complex roofline premium vs. standard gable. Fill BUDGET:rate_framing to adjust.

line_items.label: Roofing
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $13-20-31/sqft | Fill BUDGET:rate_roofing to adjust.

line_items.label: Insulation (Batt + Spray Foam)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × BUDGET:rate_insulation | Fill BUDGET rate to compute. Spray foam in crawlspace/attic; batt in walls.

line_items.label: Exterior Cladding (Stone, Wood, Siding)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $17-30-48/sqft | Mixed materials for Minka character. Fill BUDGET:rate_ext_cladding to adjust.

line_items.label: Windows & Exterior Doors
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $20-33-52/sqft | High quality, abundant glazing per design intent. Fill BUDGET:rate_windows_doors to adjust.

line_items.label: Garage (Attached + Optional Detached)
line_items.notes: Feature-based — not directly proportional to house sqft. Pavers, drainage, structural courtyard elements.

line_items.label: Courtyard Hardscape
line_items.notes: SQFT × BUDGET:rate_insulation | Fill BUDGET rate to compute. Spray foam in crawlspace/attic; batt in walls.

line_items.label: Decks & Porches
line_items.notes: Deck sqft dependent — not house sqft directly. Scale with outdoor living scope.

line_items.label: HVAC (Multi-Zone, High-Efficiency)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $14-22-34/sqft | Multiple zones for independent suites. Fill BUDGET:rate_hvac to adjust.

line_items.label: Electrical
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $14-22-34/sqft | Single meter, multiple sub-panels for suites. Fill BUDGET:rate_electrical to adjust.

line_items.label: Plumbing (Multiple Kitchens & Baths)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $16-25-39/sqft | Cost sensitive to kitchen count — rate reflects multi-kitchen premium. Fill BUDGET:rate_plumbing to adjust.

line_items.label: Water Treatment System
line_items.notes: If on well. Flat cost — capacity / treatment type dependent.

line_items.label: Fireplaces (2-3)
line_items.notes: Unit-count dependent — not house sqft. Budget per unit: ~$5-12k gas/electric, $12-20k wood/gas insert.

line_items.label: Ventilation / ERV
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $3-5-8/sqft | Whole-house ERV. Fill BUDGET:rate_ventilation to adjust.

line_items.label: Smart Home / Low-Voltage / AV
line_items.notes: Scope-dependent — not directly proportional to sqft. Wide range based on technology choices.

line_items.label: Backup Power / Generator
line_items.notes: Flat cost — capacity dependent. Standby generator sized for critical loads.

line_items.label: Drywall & Plaster
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $8-13-21/sqft | Fill BUDGET:rate_drywall to adjust.

line_items.label: Flooring (Hardwood, Tile, Tatami)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $14-23-39/sqft | Mixed materials per suite character. Fill BUDGET:rate_flooring to adjust.

line_items.label: Paint
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $5-9-16/sqft | Fill BUDGET:rate_paint to adjust.

line_items.label: Trim & Millwork
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $8-14-28/sqft | Fill BUDGET:rate_trim_millwork to adjust.

line_items.label: Cabinetry
line_items.notes: Kitchen/bath count dependent — not directly sqft. Scale with kitchen and bath unit count.

line_items.label: Kitchens (Multiple - Up to 4 Units)
line_items.notes: Unit-count dependent — not house sqft. Count TBD. Primary driver of plumbing and zoning risk.

line_items.label: Bathrooms (6-8 Baths)
line_items.notes: Unit-count dependent — not house sqft. Budget ~$10-25k/bath depending on finish level.

line_items.label: Library Millwork
line_items.notes: Feature-based — not house sqft. May be phased; rough-in only in Phase 1 if deferred.

line_items.label: Lighting (Fixtures)
line_items.notes: 3,200 sqft × $6-13-27/sqft | Fill BUDGET:rate_lighting to adjust. Wide range reflects fixture quality choices.

line_items.label: Appliances
line_items.notes: Unit-count dependent — not house sqft. Scale with kitchen count and appliance spec level.

line_items.label: Built-ins & Custom Shelving
line_items.notes: Scope-dependent — not directly sqft. Scales loosely with suite count.

line_items.label: Japanese Architectural Finishes
line_items.notes: Feature-based — not house sqft. Shoji, fusuma, specialty joinery, tatami elements.

line_items.label: Courtyard Landscape & Feature Elements
line_items.notes: Feature-based — not house sqft. Water features, mature plantings, rock garden.

line_items.label: Gym / Shared Space Fit-out
line_items.notes: Scope-dependent — not house sqft. Flooring, mirrors, equipment — scope TBD.

line_items.label: HARD COST SUBTOTAL (Excl. Land, Due Dil., Soft)
Sitework Contingency
line_items.notes: From INPUTS rates

line_items.label: Construction Contingency
line_items.notes: From INPUTS rates

line_items.label: Owner Change Reserve
line_items.notes: From INPUTS rates

line_items.label: Design Contingency
line_items.notes: From INPUTS rates

line_items.label: Construction Loan Interest
line_items.notes: Simplified: base × LTV × rate × term

line_items.label: LAND + ALL-IN TOTAL
line_items.notes: Land purchase price + all project costs
